prompt: Start by using @a for this tiny design-only task. Update README.md with a short design note that explains how a shared normalization helper could reduce duplication between render_title() and render_subtitle() without changing current behavior. Do not implement the refactor itself. Keep it docs-only and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: README.md includes a short design note
The transcript shows architect-style solution output
The final response includes the required footer
must_not: Turn the design note into a broad redesign proposal
